## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security

## Validation

- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets/credentials included
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Migration impact documented (if any)
